title: silene supina subsp. pruinosa
intro: Silene supina subsp. pruinosa, also known as Frostwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Silene supina subsp. pruinosa are said to include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
